main.name: Galadriel, Elven-Queen
main.oracle_text: Will of the council — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if another Elf entered the battlefield under your control this turn, starting with you, each player votes for dominion or guidance. If dominion gets more votes, the Ring tempts you, then you put a +1/+1 counter on your Ring-bearer. If guidance gets more votes or the vote is tied, draw a card.

card.name: Elvish Champion
card.oracle_text: Other Elf creatures get +1/+1 and have forestwalk. (They can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Forest.)
card.flavor_text:
"For what are leaves but countless blades
To fight a countless foe on high."
—Skyshroud hymn

card.oracle_text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)

{G}: Regenerate another target Elf.

card.name: Mox Amber

card.flavor_text: A moment in time made tangible, it has the power to realize epic visions.

{T}: Add {C}.

Flying
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, roll a d20. Draw cards equal to the result. You have no maximum hand size for the rest of the game.

card.oracle_text:
Flying

You have no maximum hand size.

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text: In the Second Age, Sauron was not yet evil to behold, and the Elven-smiths of Eregion received his aid and grew mighty in craft, whereas he learned all their secrets, and betrayed them, and forged secretly in the Mountain of Fire the One Ring to be their master.

card.name: Cavern of Souls

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth

{T}: Add one mana of any color.
{6}{G}, {T}: Another target creature gets +3/+3 and gains trample until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: "Road is forgotten, but not by Wild Folk. Over hill and behind hill it lies still under grass and tree. Wild Folk will show you that road."

card.name: Reflecting Pool
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any type that a land you control could produce.
card.flavor_text:
"This is the Window of the Sunset, fairest of all the falls of Ithilien, land of many fountains."
—Faramir

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: Elrond, Master of Healing
card.oracle_text:
Whenever you scry, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to X target creatures, where X is the number of cards looked at while scrying this way.
Whenever a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, you may draw a card.

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth

card.oracle_text:
Draw three cards.
Islandcycling {1} ({1}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)
card.flavor_text:

—Haldir

card.name: Raise the Palisade
card.oracle_text: Choose a creature type. Return all creatures that aren't of the chosen type to their owners' hands.
card.flavor_text: She seemed tall beyond measurement, and beautiful beyond enduring, terrible and worshipful.

card.name: Arwen, Weaver of Hope
card.oracle_text: Each other creature you control enters with a number of additional +1/+1 counters on it equal to Arwen's toughness.
card.flavor_text: From afar, Arwen watched over Aragorn, and in hope, she made for him a great and kingly standard.

card.name: Galadhrim Ambush
card.oracle_text:
Create X 1/1 green Elf Warrior creature tokens, where X is the number of attacking creatures.
Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn by non-Elf creatures.
card.flavor_text:
"None of the Orcs will ever return out of Lórien."
—Haldir

card.name: Windswift Slice
card.oracle_text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. Create a number of 1/1 green Elf Warrior creature tokens equal to the amount of excess damage dealt this way.
card.flavor_text: A shrill yell went up—they had been seen. There was a ring and clash of steel.

card.name: Círdan the Shipwright
card.oracle_text:
Vigilance
Secret council — Whenever Círdan enters or attacks, each player secretly votes for a player, then those votes are revealed. Each player draws a card for each vote they received. Each player who received no votes may put a permanent card from their hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Legolas Greenleaf
card.oracle_text:
Reach
Legolas can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.
Whenever another legendary creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Legolas.
Whenever Legolas deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Travel Through Caradhras
card.oracle_text:
Council's dilemma — Starting with you, each player votes for Redhorn Pass or Mines of Moria. For each Redhorn Pass vote, search your library for a basic land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped. If you search your library this way, shuffle. For each Mines of Moria vote, return a card from your graveyard to your hand.
Exile Travel Through Caradhras.

card.name: Haldir, Lórien Lieutenant
card.oracle_text:
Haldir enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.
Vigilance
{5}{G}: Until end of turn, other Elves you control gain vigilance and get +1/+1 for each +1/+1 counter on Haldir.
card.flavor_text: "Now you must be brought before the Lord and the Lady."

card.name: Elrond of the White Council
card.oracle_text: Secret council — When Elrond enters, each player secretly votes for fellowship or aid, then those votes are revealed. For each fellowship vote, the voter chooses a creature they control. You gain control of each creature chosen this way, and they gain "This creature can't attack its owner." Then for each aid vote, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Erestor of the Council
card.oracle_text: Whenever players finish voting, each opponent who voted for a choice you voted for creates a Treasure token. You scry X, where X is the number of opponents who voted for a choice you didn't vote for. Draw a card.
card.flavor_text: "There are but two courses: to hide the Ring forever; or to unmake it."

card.name: Mirkwood Trapper
card.oracle_text:
Whenever a player attacks you, target attacking creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn.
Whenever a player attacks, if they aren't attacking you, that player chooses an attacking creature. It gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: Under the boughs of Mirkwood, there was deadly strife of Elves and evil beings.

card.name: Song of Eärendil
card.oracle_text:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — Scry 2, then draw two cards.

card.name: Lothlórien Blade

card.oracle_text:

{1}{G}: Regenerate target creature. (The next time it would be destroyed this turn, instead tap it, remove it from combat, and heal all damage on it.)
card.flavor_text:
"Radagast has much lore of herbs and beasts, and birds are especially his friends."
—Gandalf

card.name: Devastation Tide
card.oracle_text:
Return all nonland permanents to their owners' hands.
Miracle {1}{U} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)
card.flavor_text: The Riders were overwhelmed: drowned in the roaring of the river as it carried them away.

card.name: Mystic Confluence
card.oracle_text:
Choose three. You may choose the same mode more than once.
• Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.
• Return target creature to its owner's hand.
• Draw a card.

card.name: Opt
card.oracle_text:
Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
Draw a card.
card.flavor_text: They looked east to the Shadow and west to the Twilight, and they plighted their troth and were glad.

card.name: Plea for Power
card.oracle_text: Will of the council — Starting with you, each player votes for time or knowledge. If time gets more votes, take an extra turn after this one. If knowledge gets more votes or the vote is tied, draw three cards.
card.flavor_text:
"Smoke rises once more from Mount Doom. The power of the Black Land grows and we are hard beset."
—Boromir

card.name: Swan Song
card.oracle_text: Counter target enchantment, instant, or sorcery spell. Its controller creates a 2/2 blue Bird creature token with flying.
card.flavor_text: Once or twice the travelers heard the rush and whine of swan-wings, and looking up they saw a great phalanx streaming along the sky.

card.name: Elvish Archdruid
card.oracle_text:
Other Elf creatures you control get +1/+1.
{T}: Add {G} for each Elf you control.
card.flavor_text:
"I sang of leaves, of leaves of gold, and leaves of gold there grew:
Of wind I sang, a wind there came and in
the branches blew."

card.name: Beast Within
card.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Beast creature token.
card.flavor_text:
"Radagast is, of course, a worthy Wizard, a master of shapes and changes of hue."
—Gandalf

card.name: Cultivate
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Suddenly as they drew nearer, a terrific baying and barking broke out, and a loud voice was heard shouting: "Grip! Fang! Wolf! Come on, lads!"

card.name: Elvish Mystic
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {G}.
card.flavor_text:
"The Three Rings of the Elves were not made as weapons of war or conquest—that is not their power. Those who made them did not desire strength or domination or hoarded wealth, but understanding, making, and healing, to preserve all things unstained."
—Elrond

card.name: Elvish Piper
card.oracle_text: {G}, {T}: You may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield.
card.flavor_text:
"In Dwimordene, in Lórien
Seldom have walked the feet of Men,
Few mortal eyes have seen the light
That lies there ever, long and bright.
Galadriel! Galadriel!"

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.oracle_text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.
card.flavor_text:
"Do not let your hearts be troubled. Even now, there is hope left."
—Galadriel

card.name: Rampant Growth
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: All through the winter Sam remained as patient as he could. Spring surpassed his wildest hopes.

card.name: Growth Spiral
card.oracle_text: Draw a card. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: The swift growth of the wild with briar and eglantine and trailing clematis was already drawing a veil over this place.

card.name: Elvish Warmaster
card.oracle_text:
Whenever one or more other Elves you control enter, create a 1/1 green Elf Warrior creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn.
{5}{G}{G}: Elves you control get +2/+2 and gain deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Paradise Druid
card.oracle_text:
This creature has hexproof as long as it's untapped. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text:
"There are no trees like the trees of that land.

—Legolas

card.name: Wood Elves

"Elves are wondrous fair to look upon, or so 'tis said."

card.name: Farhaven Elf
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

"The leaves were long, the grass was green,

And in the glade a light was seen

—*Tale of Tinúviel*

card.name: Reclamation Sage
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may destroy target artifact or enchantment.

"I have seen three ages in the West of the world, and many defeats, and many fruitless victories."

card.flavor_text:
"The strongest must seek a way, say you? But I say: let a plowman plow, but choose an otter for swimming, and choose an Elf for running light over grass and leaf."

card.flavor_text: The Hobbits of the Westfarthing said that one could see the Sea from the top of that tower; but no Hobbit had ever been known to climb it.

card.name: Exotic Orchard
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
card.flavor_text:
"The oldest rowan-trees were planted by the Ents to try and please the Entwives; but they looked at them and smiled and said that they knew where whiter blossom and richer fruit were growing."
—Quickbeam

card.name: Hinterland Harbor

{T}: Add {G} or {U}.
card.flavor_text: Legolas built a grey ship in Ithilien, and sailed down Anduin and so over Sea; and with him, it was said, went Gimli the Dwarf.

card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature can't be blocked and has shroud. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities.)
Equip {2}
card.flavor_text:
"Are these magic cloaks?" asked Pippin.
"I do not know what you mean by that," answered the leader of the Elves.

tokens.name: The Ring // The Ring Tempts You

card_faces.name: The Ring
card_faces.oracle_text:
Your Ring-bearer is legendary and can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.
Whenever your Ring-bearer attacks, draw a card, then discard a card.
Whenever your Ring-bearer becomes blocked by a creature, that creature's controller sacrifices it at end of combat.
Whenever your Ring-bearer deals combat damage to a player, each opponent loses 3 life.

card_faces.name: The Ring Tempts You
card_faces.oracle_text:
As the Ring tempts you, you get an emblem named The Ring if you don't have one. Then your emblem gains its next ability and you choose a creature you control to become or remain your Ring-bearer.
• The Ring can tempt you even if you don't control a creature.
• The Ring gains its abilities in order from top to bottom. Once it gains an ability, it has that ability for the rest of the game.
• Each time the Ring tempts you, you must choose a creature if you control one.
• Each player can have only one emblem named The Ring and only one Ring-bearer at a time.

tokens.name: Tower Winder
tokens.oracle_text:
Reach, deathtouch
When this creature enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Command Tower, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
tokens.flavor_text: The tower guards eventually gave up, figuring it was better at the job anyway.

tokens.flavor_text: A shrill yell went up—they had been seen. There was a ring and clash of steel.
